title: A prioritized, falsifiable roadmap to a treatment for EWSR1::NR4A3 extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma — a computation-only triage
description: A continuously-maintained, falsifiable roadmap toward a treatment for extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma (EMC), an ultra-rare sarcoma driven by the EWSR1::NR4A3 fusion. Routes are ranked by likelihood of patient benefit x near-term feasibility, each with an explicit decisive experiment and kill-criterion, and with supporting evidence generated from public data alone (no wet lab). This Zenodo record is a citable snapshot of a living document; the current state is maintained in the git repository.
